title: antennaria neglecta var. campestris
intro: Antennaria neglecta var. campestris, also known as Camfield or Mountain Everlasting, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is commonly found in dry meadows and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant has been used to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory issues. Antennaria neglecta var. campestris can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote digestion, ease coughs, and support overall well-being.
